rationale: EventResults is the per-step network I/O bundle whose four fields are all spec-meaningful: recvs/clocks/sends are the ordered sequences of NetEvents observed by the host (their order is the refinement witness, so each is kept as Seq<...>), and ios is the host's claimed event trace whose ordering must also align with event_seq() per the doc comment. There are no raw pointers, allocator handles, or ghost wrappers to drop. NetEvent is an uncovered leaf (alias to LIoOp<...> with no synthesized view), and Ios is a transparent L1 alias to Seq<NetEvent>, so following the AbstractHostState convention we carry every field structurally without calling `@` on uncovered dependencies; a future synthesis pass for NetEvent can refine these recursively.
